keywords.name: I am known as Maealil.
keywords.time: I don't own one of those little machines.
keywords.mystic: I am a philosopher and healer.
keywords.elves: We are an ancient race, abandoned by the gods and doomed to find our way alone.
keywords.dwarfs: They cultivate earth but don't understand it.
keywords.humans: They are somewhat orcish in their nature.
keywords.troll: I don't think it's a good idea to keep servants.
keywords.cenath: My parents were Deraisim but joined the Cenath caste before my birth.
keywords.kuridai: I hope they don't do something foolish one day.
keywords.deraisim: Unfortunately they are to busy to care for the finer things in life.
keywords.abdaisim: They should join our town for their and our own safety.
keywords.teshial: I would love to learn more about the Teshial.
keywords.dream: I would love to learn more about the Teshial.
keywords.crunor: The great tree is the beginning for all things living and Priyla helps us to understand that.
keywords.priyla: The daughter of the stars gives us knowledge and teaches us magic.
keywords.excalibug: Is that a new kind of bug the Deraisim found?
keywords.news: I don't know anything of importance.
keywords.magic: I can heal you or even teach you some spells of healing.
keywords.spell: I teach the spells 'Light Healing', 'Antidote', 'Antidote Rune', 'Intense Healing', 'Intense Healing Rune, 'Ultimate Healing', and 'Ultimate Healing Rune'.
keywords.light: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.healing: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.antidote: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.intense: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.ultimate: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.rune: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.blessing: There are five different blessings available in five sacred places. These blessings are: the spiritual shielding, the spark of the phoenix, the embrace of tibia, the fire of the suns and the wisdom of solitude.
keywords.pilgrimage: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.ashes: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.spiritual: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.shielding: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.sacred: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.places: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.spark: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.phoenix: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.embrace: The druids north of Carlin can provide you with the embrace of tibia.
keywords.fire: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.suns: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.wisdom: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.solitude: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

entries.response: You need to advance to magic level %A to learn this spell.
You do not have enough gold to pay my services.
From now on you can cast this spell.
